impact: The daemon can resume autonomous work on the previously blocked validation task instead of skipping it indefinitely, while the appended follow-up tasks steer future cycles toward syntactic guardrails and minimal fixture-backed validation after repeated SyntaxError and assertion failures.
summary: Unblock the public source inventory validation task and add supervisor guidance tasks that force a smaller syntax-first repair path.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-49: Add validation for the public source inventory that rejects non-allowlisted hosts, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, downloaded documents, credentials, traces, screenshots, and missing provenance fields.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
